requirement_topic.en: EMC — Myanmar MSTRD / MS Standards (IEC 55015 / CISPR 15 Basis)
requirement_topic.zh: EMC——缅甸 MSTRD / MS 标准（IEC 55015 / CISPR 15 基础）
requirement_topic.zht: EMC——緬甸 MSTRD / MS 標準（IEC 55015 / CISPR 15 基礎）

summary.en: Myanmar does not have a mandatory EMC type-approval framework for LED luminaires enforced at the border equivalent to CE-EMC or FCC Part 15. MSTRD adopts MS standards that align with IEC/CISPR publications, including CISPR 15 (Limits and methods of measurement of radio disturbance characteristics of electrical lighting equipment). However, conformity to MS/CISPR 15 is voluntary for LED luminaires in Myanmar as of 2026 — it is not a statutory market-entry condition. Importers supplying luminaires to large commercial or government projects may encounter specification requirements referencing CISPR 15 or IEC 60598 electromagnetic compatibility provisions. MPT (Myanmar Posts and Telecommunications) has authority over radio frequency emissions for wireless-enabled products — see ledmm-emc-02.
summary.zh: 截至 2026 年，缅甸对 LED 灯具没有与 CE-EMC 或 FCC Part 15 相当的强制性边境 EMC 型式批准框架。MSTRD 采用与 IEC/CISPR 出版物对应的 MS 标准，包括 CISPR 15（电气照明设备无线电干扰特性的限值和测量方法）。但 MS/CISPR 15 对缅甸 LED 灯具而言为自愿性——截至 2026 年不构成法定市场准入条件。向大型商业或政府项目供货的进口商可能会遇到引用 CISPR 15 或 IEC 60598 电磁兼容条款的规格要求。缅甸邮电部（MPT）对无线使能产品的射频发射具有监管权限——详见 ledmm-emc-02。
summary.zht: 截至 2026 年，緬甸對 LED 燈具沒有與 CE-EMC 或 FCC Part 15 相當的強制性邊境 EMC 型式批准框架。MSTRD 採用與 IEC/CISPR 出版物對應的 MS 標準，包括 CISPR 15（電氣照明設備無線電干擾特性的限值和測量方法）。但 MS/CISPR 15 對緬甸 LED 燈具而言為自願性——截至 2026 年不構成法定市場准入條件。向大型商業或政府項目供貨的進口商可能會遇到引用 CISPR 15 或 IEC 60598 電磁兼容條款的規格要求。緬甸郵電部（MPT）對無線使能產品的射頻發射具有監管權限——詳見 ledmm-emc-02。

standards_or_laws: MS/CISPR 15 (Myanmar standard aligned with CISPR 15 — Limits and methods of measurement of radio disturbance characteristics of electrical lighting equipment) — voluntary
MS/IEC 60598-1 (General requirements for luminaires, including EMC provisions) — voluntary adoption by MSTRD

summary.en: In China, LED luminaires must comply with GB 17743-2021 (Limits and methods of measurement of radio disturbance characteristics of electrical lighting equipment and similar equipment — equivalent to CISPR 15) and GB 17625.1-2022 (Electromagnetic compatibility — Limits for harmonic current emissions). EMC compliance is required for CCC certification; test reports must be from a CNAS-accredited laboratory. SRRC type approval is additionally required for wireless-enabled products.
summary.zh: 在中国，LED 灯具须符合 GB 17743-2021（电气照明和类似设备的无线电骚扰特性的限值和测量方法——等同于 CISPR 15）和 GB 17625.1-2022（电磁兼容——谐波电流发射限值）。EMC 合规为 CCC 认证的必要条件；检测报告须来自 CNAS 认可实验室。无线使能产品还须取得 SRRC 型号核准。
summary.zht: 在中國，LED 燈具須符合 GB 17743-2021（電氣照明和類似設備的無線電騷擾特性的限值和測量方法——等同於 CISPR 15）和 GB 17625.1-2022（電磁兼容——諧波電流發射限值）。EMC 合規為 CCC 認證的必要條件；檢測報告須來自 CNAS 認可實驗室。無線使能產品還須取得 SRRC 型號核准。

standards_or_laws: GB 17743-2021 — Limits and methods of measurement of radio disturbance characteristics of electrical lighting and similar equipment (SAC/SAMR — equivalent to CISPR 15)
GB 17625.1-2022 — Electromagnetic compatibility — Limits for harmonic current emissions (SAC/SAMR)

gap.en: Myanmar does not have a mandatory EMC market-entry requirement for LED luminaires as of 2026 — Chinese GB 17743 / CCC EMC compliance is more stringent than Myanmar's current regulatory floor. Manufacturers holding valid CN CCC EMC test reports (CISPR 15 / GB 17743 basis) will satisfy any Myanmar project-specification EMC requirement, as the technical basis is aligned. No additional Myanmar-specific EMC certification body approval is required for standard (non-wireless) LED luminaires. The practical compliance gap runs in reverse: Myanmar imports Chinese products with a higher EMC documentation baseline than Myanmar currently mandates.
gap.zh: 截至 2026 年，缅甸对 LED 灯具没有强制性 EMC 市场准入要求——中国 GB 17743 / CCC EMC 合规标准比缅甸现行法规门槛更严格。持有有效中国 CCC EMC 检测报告（基于 CISPR 15 / GB 17743）的制造商能够满足缅甸项目规格中的任何 EMC 要求，因为技术基础相符。标准（非无线）LED 灯具不需要额外的缅甸特定 EMC 认证机构批准。实际合规差距呈反向：缅甸进口的中国产品所具备的 EMC 文件基础高于缅甸目前的强制要求。
gap.zht: 截至 2026 年，緬甸對 LED 燈具沒有強制性 EMC 市場准入要求——中國 GB 17743 / CCC EMC 合規標準比緬甸現行法規門檻更嚴格。持有有效中國 CCC EMC 檢測報告（基於 CISPR 15 / GB 17743）的製造商能夠滿足緬甸項目規格中的任何 EMC 要求，因為技術基礎相符。標準（非無線）LED 燈具不需要額外的緬甸特定 EMC 認證機構批准。實際合規差距呈反向：緬甸進口的中國產品所具備的 EMC 文件基礎高於緬甸目前的強制要求。

mandatory_status.target: Voluntary — no mandatory EMC type-approval required for standard LED luminaires in Myanmar as of 2026; MS/CISPR 15 compliance is voluntary; MPT approval required separately for wireless-enabled products
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory — GB 17743-2021 and GB 17625.1 EMC compliance required as part of CCC certification; test reports from CNAS-accredited laboratories required

source.publisher: Myanmar Standards and Testing Research Division (MSTRD), Ministry of Science and Technology

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Myanmar has no mandatory EMC approval requirement for standard LED luminaires as of 2026. Chinese CCC EMC test reports (GB 17743 / CISPR 15 basis) satisfy any project-specification EMC requirement in Myanmar. For wireless-enabled luminaires, MPT type approval is a separate mandatory step. No Myanmar-specific EMC retesting is required for non-wireless products.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 截至 2026 年，缅甸对标准 LED 灯具无强制性 EMC 许可要求。中国 CCC EMC 检测报告（GB 17743 / CISPR 15 基础）可满足缅甸项目规格中的任何 EMC 要求。无线使能灯具须单独取得 MPT 型号批准。非无线产品无需为缅甸专门进行 EMC 重新测试。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 截至 2026 年，緬甸對標準 LED 燈具無強制性 EMC 許可要求。中國 CCC EMC 檢測報告（GB 17743 / CISPR 15 基礎）可滿足緬甸項目規格中的任何 EMC 要求。無線使能燈具須單獨取得 MPT 型號批准。非無線產品無需為緬甸專門進行 EMC 重新測試。

requirement_topic.en: MPT Type Approval for Smart / Wireless-Enabled LED Luminaires
requirement_topic.zh: 智能/无线 LED 灯具的 MPT 型号批准
requirement_topic.zht: 智能/無線 LED 燈具的 MPT 型號批准

summary.en: Myanmar Posts and Telecommunications (MPT), operating under the Ministry of Transport and Communications (MoTC), administers radio frequency spectrum and type approval for wireless-enabled devices in Myanmar. LED luminaires incorporating Wi-Fi, Bluetooth, Zigbee, or other radio modules are classified as wireless telecom terminal equipment and require MPT type approval before importation and sale. The type approval process involves submission of technical documentation and test reports (referencing IEC or ETSI standards) to MPT for review. MPT may accept test reports from accredited overseas laboratories. Smart LED luminaires without wireless radio modules are not subject to MPT type approval.
summary.zh: 缅甸邮电部（MPT，隶属交通通信部 MoTC）负责缅甸无线频率频谱管理及无线设备的型号批准。集成 Wi-Fi、蓝牙、Zigbee 或其他无线模块的 LED 灯具被归类为无线电信终端设备，须在进口及销售前取得 MPT 型号批准。型号批准流程包括向 MPT 提交技术文件和检测报告（参照 IEC 或 ETSI 标准）供审查。MPT 可接受经认可的境外实验室出具的检测报告。不含无线射频模块的智能 LED 灯具不受 MPT 型号批准约束。
summary.zht: 緬甸郵電部（MPT，隸屬交通通信部 MoTC）負責緬甸無線頻率頻譜管理及無線設備的型號批准。集成 Wi-Fi、藍牙、Zigbee 或其他無線模塊的 LED 燈具被歸類為無線電信終端設備，須在進口及銷售前取得 MPT 型號批准。型號批准流程包括向 MPT 提交技術文件和檢測報告（參照 IEC 或 ETSI 標準）供審查。MPT 可接受經認可的境外實驗室出具的檢測報告。不含無線射頻模塊的智能 LED 燈具不受 MPT 型號批准約束。

standards_or_laws: Myanmar Telecommunications Law (2013) and subsidiary MPT type approval procedures — Ministry of Transport and Communications (MoTC)
MPT Type Approval — technical documentation referencing IEC/ETSI standards for wireless modules

summary.en: In China, wireless-enabled LED luminaires require SRRC (State Radio Regulation Commission) type approval for the radio module under MIIT regulations. SRRC approval covers frequency band, emission power, and modulation for Wi-Fi, Bluetooth, and Zigbee modules. CCC certification for the luminaire and SRRC approval for the wireless module are both required for CN market entry. SRRC-approved modules from established Chinese suppliers may have existing SRRC certificates that can be referenced in the product technical file.
summary.zh: 在中国，无线使能 LED 灯具须依据工业和信息化部（MIIT）规定，为无线模块取得国家无线电管理委员会（SRRC）型号核准。SRRC 核准涵盖 Wi-Fi、蓝牙及 Zigbee 模块的频段、发射功率及调制方式。灯具 CCC 认证和无线模块 SRRC 核准均为进入中国市场的必要条件。知名中国供应商提供的已取得 SRRC 核准的模块可能拥有现成 SRRC 证书，可在产品技术文件中引用。
summary.zht: 在中國，無線使能 LED 燈具須依據工業和信息化部（MIIT）規定，為無線模塊取得國家無線電管理委員會（SRRC）型號核准。SRRC 核准涵蓋 Wi-Fi、藍牙及 Zigbee 模塊的頻段、發射功率及調制方式。燈具 CCC 認證和無線模塊 SRRC 核准均為進入中國市場的必要條件。知名中國供應商提供的已取得 SRRC 核准的模塊可能擁有現成 SRRC 證書，可在產品技術文件中引用。

standards_or_laws: SRRC type approval — State Radio Regulation Commission (MIIT), China — required for wireless radio modules in products sold in China

gap.en: Chinese SRRC type approval for the wireless module is not recognised by MPT Myanmar — a separate MPT type approval application is required for smart LED luminaires incorporating wireless radio modules. The MPT process requires submission of technical documentation and test reports to MPT directly. Processing timelines and fees for MPT type approval should be confirmed with a local Myanmar representative or licensed telecom consultant, as procedures may evolve. Non-wireless LED luminaires are not affected by this gap.
gap.zh: 中国无线模块的 SRRC 型号核准不被缅甸 MPT 认可——集成无线射频模块的智能 LED 灯具须单独向 MPT 申请型号批准。MPT 流程要求直接向 MPT 提交技术文件和检测报告。MPT 型号批准的处理时间和费用应向当地缅甸代理或持牌电信顾问确认，因流程可能持续调整。非无线 LED 灯具不受本项差距影响。
gap.zht: 中國無線模塊的 SRRC 型號核准不被緬甸 MPT 認可——集成無線射頻模塊的智能 LED 燈具須單獨向 MPT 申請型號批准。MPT 流程要求直接向 MPT 提交技術文件和檢測報告。MPT 型號批准的處理時間和費用應向當地緬甸代理或持牌電信顧問確認，因流程可能持續調整。非無線 LED 燈具不受本項差距影響。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory for wireless-enabled products — MPT type approval required before importation and sale of LED luminaires incorporating Wi-Fi, Bluetooth, Zigbee, or other radio modules; not applicable to non-wireless luminaires
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory for wireless-enabled products — SRRC type approval required for wireless radio modules under MIIT; CCC certification required for the luminaire

source.publisher: Ministry of Transport and Communications (MoTC), Republic of the Union of Myanmar

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Smart or wireless-enabled LED luminaires (incorporating Wi-Fi, Bluetooth, Zigbee, or similar radio modules) require MPT type approval in Myanmar before importation and sale. Chinese SRRC type approval is not recognised by MPT. A separate MPT application with technical documentation and test reports is required. Standard non-wireless LED luminaires are not subject to MPT type approval.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 集成 Wi-Fi、蓝牙、Zigbee 或类似无线模块的智能 LED 灯具在缅甸进口及销售前须取得 MPT 型号批准。中国 SRRC 型号核准不被 MPT 认可。须另行提交技术文件和检测报告向 MPT 单独申请。标准非无线 LED 灯具不受 MPT 型号批准约束。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 集成 Wi-Fi、藍牙、Zigbee 或類似無線模塊的智能 LED 燈具在緬甸進口及銷售前須取得 MPT 型號批准。中國 SRRC 型號核准不被 MPT 認可。須另行提交技術文件和檢測報告向 MPT 單獨申請。標準非無線 LED 燈具不受 MPT 型號批准約束。
